content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Middle of the Contest". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1133/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers a and b.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the result of the given expression.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

code.Python3:
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    a, b = map(int, input().split())
    print(a + b)
